message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor "bruger" as user
participant "index.jsp" as index
participant "resultat.jsp" as resultat

participant "BmiUtil" as bmiUtil
participant "PresentationLayer" as presentationLayer
participant "LogicFacade" as logicFacade
participant "DBAccess" as dbAccess
participant "BmiDB" as bmiDB

participant "Initializer" as initializer
participant "FrontController" as frontController
participant "Command" as command
participant "Resultat" as resultatObj
participant "LogicFacade" as logicFacadeObj
participant "BmiMapper" as bmiMapper

note over presentationLayer, logicFacade: Initialization
note over presentationLayer, logicFacade: Beregn BMI

user -> index: 1 start
index -> bmiUtil: 2 getSportList()
bmiUtil --> index: 3 ArrayList<Sport>

user -> frontController: 4 doPost()
frontController -> frontController: 5 processRequest()
frontController -> command: 6 from()
command --> frontController: 7 Resultat
frontController -> resultatObj: 8 execute()
resultatObj -> logicFacade: 9 insertBmiItem()
logicFacade -> dbAccess: 10 insertBmiItem()
dbAccess -> bmiDB: 11 executeQuery()
bmiDB --> dbAccess: 12 OK
dbAccess --> logicFacade: 13 OK
logicFacade --> frontController: 14 OK
frontController --> index: 15 resultat
index --> user: 16 forward()

@enduml
